zh.Downham, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾堂納姆
zh.Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾瓦姆斯沃斯

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Goodale於1490年出生在英國坎布利其爾堂納姆時，他的父親Sir John Goodale II20歲，母親Lady Margaret Boso17歲。他於大約1510年與Lady Elizabeth Ulam在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1588年在他的家鄉享年99歲，埋葬在英國越可爾瓦姆斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Goodale于1490年出生在英国坎布利其爾堂納姆时，他的父亲Sir John Goodale II20岁，母亲Lady Margaret Boso17岁。他于大约1510年与Lady Elizabeth Ulam在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1588年在他的家乡享年99岁，埋葬在英国越可爾瓦姆斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Goodale was born in 1490, in Downham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir John Goodale II, was 20 and his mother, Lady Margaret Boso, was 17. He married Lady Elizabeth Ulam about 1510, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1588, in his hometown, at the age of 99, and was buried in Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Goodale est né en 1490, à Downham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Goodale II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Boso, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Ulam environ 1510, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1588, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterré à Warmsworth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Goodale 1490 in Downham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Goodale II 20 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Boso 17. Er hat um 1510 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England Lady Elizabeth Ulam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1588 im Alter von 99 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Goodale è nato il nel 1490 nel Downham, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Goodale II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Boso, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Ulam circa 1510, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1588, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolto a Warmsworth, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Goodaleが1490年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアダウンハムで生まれた時，父Sir John Goodale IIは20歳，母Lady Margaret Bosoは17歳であった。約1510年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでLady Elizabeth Ulamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1588年に故郷で99歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアワームスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Goodale(이)가 1490년 영국 캄브리지실르 다운함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Goodale II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Boso(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Lady Elizabeth Ulam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1588년 그의 고향에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 워스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Goodale nasceu em 1490, em Downham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Goodale II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Boso, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Ulam aproximadamente 1510, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1588, em sua cidade natal, com 99 anos, e foi sepultado em Warmsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Goodale родился в 1490 г. в местности доунам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Goodale II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Boso, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Ulam около 1510 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1588 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 99 лет и был похоронен в местности вармсворт, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Goodale nació en 1490, en Downham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Goodale II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Boso, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Ulam aproximadamente 1510, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1588, en su pueblo, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultado en Warmsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
